overview: Restore Hyper Wellness is a wellness center offering science-backed therapies across cellular health, recovery, and aesthetic services. Services include cryotherapy, red light therapy, IV drip therapy, skin treatments, and weight loss programs.
highlights: IV drip therapy (NAD+, Niagen) for cellular health
Comprehensive skin health services (facials, peels, dermaplaning)
Cryotherapy, red light therapy, and infrared sauna
targetAudience: People seeking wellness optimization, athletic recovery, skin health improvements, and medicated weight loss.
